comments: Approved based on direct verification. git show for commit ad254da matched the declared execution result exactly: the only implementation file added was tasks/v0.7-m4-environment-adaptation.md, and the only additional changed files were the allowed artifacts tasks/v0.7-m4-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.7-m4-result-review-packet.json. The markdown explicitly defines environment discovery/fingerprinting, capability modeling, compatibility and drift analysis, and adapter abstraction rules for multiple AI coding environments. No MCP server or CLI implementation code was introduced, no adapter templates were rewritten, no protocol lock-in to a single toolchain occurred, and no workflow state semantics were modified in the commit.
